dataset_collection.purpose: Benchmark datasets for LZ78 complexity-based sentiment classification

datasets.name: imdb
datasets.description: Large Movie Review Dataset for binary sentiment classification
datasets.paper: Learning Word Vectors for Sentiment Analysis (Maas et al., ACL 2011)

datasets.name: amazon_polarity
datasets.description: Amazon reviews with binary sentiment polarity
datasets.source: Zhang et al. (2015), processed by HuggingFace user fancyzhx
datasets.paper: Character-level Convolutional Networks for Text Classification (Zhang et al., NIPS 2015)
datasets.notes: Originally 3.6M train + 400k test; sampled to 50k + 10k for manageable size

datasets.name: tweet_sentiment
datasets.description: Twitter sentiment dataset converted to binary (dropped neutral class)
datasets.paper: TweetEval: Unified Benchmark and Comparative Evaluation for Tweet Classification (Barbieri et al., EMNLP 2020)
datasets.notes: Original dataset has 3 classes (0=negative, 1=neutral, 2=positive). Neutral examples removed. Validation split merged into train.
